---
title: "summary.yml"
---

Post an AI summary comment on newly opened issues, using the GitHub models API.

## Inputs

This workflow takes no inputs.

## Permissions

Grant `issues: write`, `models: read`, and `contents: read`.

## Example

```yaml
# Copy to .github/workflows/summary.yml in your repo.
# NOTE: the calling job must grant issues:write + models:read.
name: Summarize new issues

on:
  issues:
    types: [opened]

jobs:
  summary:
    permissions:
      issues: write
      models: read
      contents: read
    uses: d-morrison/gha/.github/workflows/summary.yml@v1
```

See [`examples/summary.yml`](https://github.com/d-morrison/gha/blob/main/examples/summary.yml)
for the full caller stub.
